description: Unified Claude Code Hooks System - Memento Architecture

recall.description: On-demand recall model (Responses API): recall_history queries, deep-retrospective, self-evolution. maxTokens covers reasoning + visible output.

summarize.description: Per-compaction session summary (Responses API): the rolling-history punch list + diagnosis written by precompact-llm. maxTokens covers reasoning + visible output.

formatting.comment: DISABLED: auto-format on every Write|Edit caused overhead (npx spawn per edit), surprise whole-file reformats (no repo .prettierrc, so prettier defaults fight the file's style), and stale-file churn. Run formatters manually instead. Flip to true only with a committed formatter config that matches the codebase.

linting.comment: Read-only lint of the edited file (CHECK mode, never --fix). Surfaces issues and nudges the agent to fix them — including pre-existing ones — while the file is open. Bounded to maxIssues lines / timeoutMs. Each linter runs ONLY when its config (`requires`) is present, so projects without that linter stay quiet and rely on the editor's native type diagnostics. eslint MUST use a single-line format (unix/compact) so output is parseable.

evolution.description: Self-evolution loop: lessons.jsonl -> aggregation -> LLM synthesis -> proposals -> user review

puntax.description: PUNTAX v2 settings. Per-subsystem env overrides: PUNTAX_CONTEXT_ROUTER, PUNTAX_EVENT_LEDGER, PUNTAX_PRECOMPACT_MODE, PUNTAX_CODE_MAP, PUNTAX_LSP, PUNTAX_LLM_DISTILLATION. The permission layer (cf-approve) is intentionally untouched in v2; there is no permission governor block.
